cases.name: 匿名认证
cases.notes: Route is at /v1/auth/anonymous (not /auth/anonymous). Requires 'platform' field (ios|android|taptap) in addition to device_id. Returns is_new_player (not is_new). New player gets 201, returning player gets 200. Token, player_id and is_new_player all present.

cases.name: 读取存档
cases.notes: Route is at /v1/save/:playerId (requires player_id in path, not /save). Uses JWT token from TC-S01. Returns full save data.

cases.name: 排行榜
cases.notes: Route is at /v1/leaderboard?limit=5. Does NOT require auth. Returns 30 seeded entries with pagination.

cases.name: 无 token 401
cases.notes: GET /v1/save/:playerId without Authorization header correctly returns 401.

notes: All 4 smoke cases pass. Key deviations from node-spec: (1) all routes live under /v1 prefix; (2) /auth/anonymous requires 'platform' field; (3) auth response field is 'is_new_player' not 'is_new'; (4) /save route requires playerId path param. PostgreSQL running on port 5432 with glow_island database seeded. Backend starts cleanly with ts-node on port 3000.
